name: Take-Two Interactive
analysis: TTWO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $236.4950, stop $203.9400, target $334.1600 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
